title: The Kozmikk Kut
body:
# 
# This modpack has been abandoned in favor of the new one [The Kozmikk Kut Reborn](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-kozmikk-kut-reborn)


**The Kozmikk Kut** is a Modpack for The Kozmikk Kut SMP Server that tries to enhance the vanilla experience and add a solid amount of new content. Built with care to provide multiplayer fun and a immersive experience

+ **Ocean Exploration!** Dive into vibrant oceans teeming with new life thanks to Hybrid Aquatic, Naturalist and More Axolotl Variants! Explore it with the Small Ships mod. The continents mod makes traversing the open ocean much more interesting 🌊

+ **Revamped/New Biomes!** Explore breathtaking landscapes 🌱 with mods like Continents, Better Nether/End, the William Withers' Collection and Wilder Wild which can be traversed with ships, carts, aircraft, gliders and grappling hooks

+ **Revamped/New Dimensions!** The Nether and End have been redone with Better Nether/End. Then explore the two new dimensions Eden Ring and The Otherside

+  **New Structures To Discover!** Explore mysterious structures and dungeons with Dungeons and Taverns, Phillips Ruins, and Yung's collection of dungeon revamps

+  **Fascinating Creatures!** Encounter a menagerie of fascinating new creatures with AdventureZ, Friends & Foes, Naturalist and More Mob Variants 🐔! 

+ **Treats & Meats!** Craft delicious meals to fuel your adventures with Farmer's Delight Refabricated and a collection of addons 🍔

+ **Create Something New!** Team up with friends to create amazing contraptions and structures with Create, Simple Pipes and Tom's Simple Storage; along with many expansions

+ **General Ambience Improved!**  Particular ✨, Visuality, FootprintParticle, Explosive Enhancements, Immersive Weathering, Wakes and several animation mods will make your game look anew! 

+ **Visuals Redone!**  4 Shaders all compatible with Distant Horizons. Including a custom config for "Euphoria Patches" shader that makes Complementary Reimagined compatible with "Spyglass Astronomy" 🌠

+ **Audio Revamp!** Presence Footsteps, Sounds, Immersive Thunder and Drip Sounds fill your world with new sounds

+ **Villages Improved!** Guard villages, Improved Plains Villages, Village Names, Improved Pillagers and a new village type Ribbits 🐸. **DON'T** steal from them though or the guards might have something to talk to you about!

+ **Land Management!** Using Cadmus and the teaming system of Argonauts thru Journeymap you can protect your land how you want!

+ **Preset Controls & Settings!** Everything is pre-configured for you to just get going. Upon Modpack updates your settings will also be remembered! ⚙️

+ **QOL & Balance Changes!** Day's are 45mins long and nights are 10mins long. Waystones do not spawn in villages and only spawn on waystone towers. **ALL** scrolls have been disabled and the recipe for Waystones has been nerfed. You can only use the Waystones themselves to teleport to encourage exploration. Phantoms now only spawn above Z level 180 and in The Otherside dimension. Dozens of QOL mods and edits have also been made

+ If interested in joining my sever then message Kozmikk after joining this [discord](https://discord.gg/cFQAUhWz5t) and I may add you to the whitelist

+ If you want to run your own server message me and I'll prepare you server files for the latest version


>**WARNING!**
Notice about **DISTANT HORIZONS**. Still in Alpha and there is a large hit to performance even when disabling the rendering. If experiencing low performance disable it in modrinth, use a more performant shader or none! When playing on a multiplayer server you MUST disable "Distant Generation" it will tank your performance for no gain as there is no server-side version of the mod as of (07/10/2024)

# Mod Config Changes
___
	Creeper Overhaul Disabled Ocean Creepers (Just really annoying when traversing the sea and way too many of them)
	
	Footprint Particles - Disabled footprints for slimes and magma cubes
	
	Herd's Panic - Mobs can run twice as far as default to get away from you
	
	Naturalist - Lowered Bass spawn rate a little and made it so that farm animals could spawn in Forests and Savannas again. Disabled fireflies since we'll be using wilder wild's firefly's
	
	Traveler's Titles - Made it so that the text appears in the top left of the screen to improve immersion
	
	Visuality - Disabled rain drop circles in water because all ready done by the Particular Mod
	
	Spyglass Improvements - Hide the settings button since it causes crashes for some reason (Edit the config or mod menu UI if you want to edit the mod)
	
	Particular - Disabled Fireflies for wilder wild's fireflies
	
	Wakes - Disabled everything except for the boat simulation and planes that form. The only feature missing from the Particular mod
	
	Time & Wind - The days last 45 minutes and the nights last 10
	
	Simple Voice Chat - Disabled Voice Groups and Recording
	
	Supplementaries - Disabled rope because all use cases are taken or better by the Farmer's Delight Rope
	
	Waystones - Only the owner can rename a waystone, they do not spawn in villages and have to be found on a waystone tower or very rarely one will spawn in nature. They require 4 XP levels per 1000 blocks traveled. The return/bound/warp scrolls have been disabled. You MUST use the waystones themselves to teleport. It now takes "Eyes of Ender" instead of "Ender Pearls" to craft warpstones and warpdust
	
	Sparse Structures - By default makes structures twice as rare; I've set it to in-between this and vanilla. So everything is 50% rarer
	
	Waystone Towers - They are the only structures that are twice as rare (sparse structures default value)
	
	Immersive Melodies - Made mobs spawning with instruments from 1 in a hundred to 1 in a thousand. It happened way too much so its more of an easter egg now than a constant thing
	
	Bat Membrane - Phantoms only spawn in the Otherside dimension. You can also get phantom membrane from bats now
    
	World Previewer - Disabled menu option button. Can only be used on world create
	
	Wilder Wild - Lowered spawnrate of jellyfish from 30 to 6. Lowered crab spawn rate from 20 to 8 to not overdo it
	
	Your Options Shall Be Respected - Default 90FOV, tutorials disabled, warnings disabled, GUI set to 3, disabled vsync, unlimited FPS, default mod resource packs, lowered the volume of music to 10% and ambient sounds to 40%
	
	Complementary Shaders - A custom config provided for Complementary + Euphoria Patches. This makes the shader compatible with "Spyglass Astronomy"

# Troubleshooting
	1. Change modrinth Java Memory usage to 10000mb if you have 16GB of memory and 12000mb if you have 32GB of memory; do not go above 12000mb!
	2. Update java versions
	3. Update GPU Drivers
	4. Turn off distant horizons completely if experiencing issues
	5. If experiencing any issues message kozmikk on Discord
